title: Ganner (disambiguation)
content:
Several individuals have gone by the forename '''Ganner''', including:

*'''[[Ganner]]''', head of security for the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]]
*'''[[Ganner Krieg]]''', an [[Imperial Knight]]
*'''[[Ganner Rhysode]]''', a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[New Jedi Order]]
*'''[[Ganner Squadron]]''', a callsign used during the [[Blockade of Corellia]] in tribute to Rhysode
**'''[[Ganner One]]''', [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles']] designation, later given to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
**'''[[Ganner Two]]''', [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] designation
**'''[[Ganner Three]]''', [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] designation
**'''[[Ganner Four]]''', [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]'s designation

{{Disambig}}

|de=Ganner
}}
